prompt: Ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a confident athletic man wearing an oversized matte-black crewneck sweatshirt with a clean round neckline, no logos, no visible accessories except a subtle ear stud. Shot in a minimalist studio against a seamless light gray-to-white gradient background with cool monochrome tones. The subject occupies approximately 70-75% of the 4:5 frame from mid-torso upward, leaving generous negative space above the head. Low-angle camera perspective from slightly below chest level, creating a powerful and dominant presence. The man stands with shoulders relaxed, head tilted slightly to his right, neck elongated and prominent, looking directly into the camera with an intense, calm, serious expression-closed lips, neutral mouth, piercing eyes, quiet confidence, no smile. Dramatic overhead soft lighting creates deep black shadows across the upper face and eye sockets, sculpting the cheekbones, jawline, and neck while preserving subtle skin texture. High contrast yet soft transitions, cinematic fashion photography aesthetic, desaturated blacks, cool gray highlights, muted color palette, premium luxury campaign look. Hair is short, dark, neatly textured with slight volume on top and clean faded sides. No hands visible in the frame. Sharp focus on facial features, shallow depth of field, editorial magazine quality, moody atmosphere, refined minimalism, ultra-detailed skin, natural imperfections, professional studio photography, 85mm lens, f/2.8, photorealistic, luxury fashion portrait --ar 4:5.
